data.name: S.X.E. Slider: Hard Ridin'
data.detailed_description:
S.X.E. Slider: Hard Ridin' is a Wild West inspired sliding tile puzzle game with a Western theme.

It features 25 puzzles with varying difficulty and a twangy soundtrack.

Gameplay:

Slide puzzle pieces in order to complete the image.

Once a puzzle is completed, you can view the full image on the menu.

Features:

  • 25 Beautiful Puzzles

  • Varying Puzzle Difficulty

  • Western Soundtrack

  • Full Controller Support

  • High Quality Features

pc_requirements.minimum:

  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/10/11
  • 處理器: 4+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 9 Compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1200 MB 可用空間
